mission: Define hexaComp total function on Strand and CONVERT C.1 (axiom_hexa_comp_strand_op_well_defined) from `: True` axiom to derived theorem in Foundation/Axioms.lean. C.2/C.3/C.4 retained as axioms (biological/structural meaning underspecified or false). Net -1 axiom for THIS mission scope.

hexaComp.semantics: placeholder dispatch — returns s₁ unchanged in every case
hexaComp.raw_91_c3_honest: biologically uninformative; does NOT capture protein-RNA complex / binding pose / multi-strand composition; single purpose is to inhabit total-function signature for C.1 derivation

hexaComp_well_defined.signature: ∀ (s₁ s₂ : Strand), ∃! (s₃ : Strand), s₃ = hexaComp s₁ s₂
hexaComp_well_defined.proof: refine ⟨hexaComp s₁ s₂, rfl, ?_⟩; intro y hy; exact hy
hexaComp_well_defined.purpose: strengthened-form C.1 well-definedness; backward-compatible :True projection retained in Axioms.lean for callsite stability

strand_complex_deferred.reason_1: cross-cutting refactor risk — adding StrandComplex would change hexaComp signature and force changes to opaque ClosedUnderHEXAComp Strand predicate, rippling through MKBridge/AX2; mission safety constraint forbids cross-cutting refactor without user approval
strand_complex_deferred.reason_2: mission goal (C.1 axiom → theorem) achieved by simpler hexaComp : Strand → Strand → Strand placeholder; richer semantics is W9+ work

C2_axiom_hexa_comp_associativity.rationale: non-associative in general — protein-RNA binding pose is order-dependent; CANNOT be discharged trivially even with full semantics

C3_axiom_hexa_comp_identity.rationale: no biological identity element under placeholder semantics; pending W9+ richer carrier (e.g. distinguished Strand.empty unit)

C4_axiom_hexa_comp_zfc_class_closure.rationale: depends on StrandClass_ZFC (already chained axiom system); pending W9+ joint work

axiom_hexa_comp_closure_atom.rationale: inhabits opaque predicate; cannot be eliminated until §6 opaque ClosedUnderHEXAComp is given a non-opaque definition

axiom_count.concurrent_cycle_11_step1b_delta: -1 (step1.b mechanisation, separate fan-out — already present in worktree state when this mission started)
